name: @hope-ui/presets
description: hope-ui presets — one tree-shakable package, per-preset subpaths (@hope-ui/presets/hope is the default visual identity). Each preset ships two Tailwind v4 CSS files — tailwind.css (structure: the @theme inline mapping to clean utilities) and theme.css (the --hope-* design-token values, opt-out so you can bring your own) — plus a runtime recipe map: import the CSS into your Tailwind entry, pass the recipe map to <ThemeProvider>.
